case_title: LAWRENCE BUCK VS. EAST WEST PARTNERS-TAOE, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHAEL HEATH IN SUPPORT OF TIMELY FILING OF OPPOS. TO MTN TO TRANSFER ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUCK, LAWRENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUCK, LAWRENCE TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT EAST WEST PARTNERS-TAHOE, INC ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $2,995.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,995.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUCK, LAWRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT EAST WEST PARTNERS-TAHOE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA EWP-TAHOE, INC., AND S/I/I TO TAHOE MOUNTAIN CLUB DBA TAHOE MOUNTAIN CLUB DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-02-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-18-2008

MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $2,995.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE DEC-21-2008, FILED BY DEFENDANT EAST WEST PARTNERS-TAHOE, INC

NOTICE OF MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT EAST WEST PARTNERS-TAHOE, INC HEARING SET FOR OCT-09-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUCK, LAWRENCE

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT EAST WEST PARTNERS-TAHOE, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES IS GRANTED. CASE TRANSFERRED TO NEVADA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF TO REIMBURSE DEFENDANT $2,620.00 REPRESENTING REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN BRINGING THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-09-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
